english translation text: Yeh Sochta Hun Ke Abid Ka Hall Kya HogaI am wondering what the state of Abid (Imam Sajjad) would have beenEnglish Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
Yeh Sochta Hun Ke Abid Ka Hall Kya Hoga,Aseer Hoke Wo Jab Shaam Mein Gaya Hoga
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
I am wondering what the state of Abid (Imam Sajjad) would have been,
After being a prisoner he was taken to Shaam (Damascus)

urdu transliteration text:
Suna Hai Shaam Mein Jatey Hi Khoon Rone Laga,Na Jaane Shimr Ne Uss Waqt Kya Kaha Hoga
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
I have heard after going to Shaam (Damascus) he cried tears of blood,
No one knows what Shimr would have said to him

urdu transliteration text:
Galey Ne Tauq Ne Abid Ko Kya Jhukana Tha,Who Apne Khoye Huwe Laal Dhoondta Hoga
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
What pain would Abid (Imam Sajjad) have suffered whilst wearing a collar of iron around his neck,
He must have been looking for his lost beloved
I am sure that he will be weeping to this day

urdu transliteration text:
Wo Yaad Karta To Hoga Watan Ki Shaahi Ko,Bahen Ko Dafn Jo Pardeis Mein Kya Hoga
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
He must have been remembering his royal city [Medina],
What would he have felt by burying his sister away from home (i.e. in Shaam)
In my (poet) view he is the master of the endurance and forbearance
